title: Aurora, 12775, Bonnie Honey Bear, 13In, Soft Toy, Brown
features: From Aurora's highly popular Teddy Bear Collection
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials
Bonnie Bear is a gorgeous super soft Teddy Bear with a cuddly body
Children will love this soft and huggable Teddy Bear
description: From the manufacturer Aurora Bonnie Honey Teddy Bear Bonnie Honey is a beautiful, traditional looking bear made by Aurora World. Bonnie Honey has cute button eyes and lots of character. Bonnie Honey Teddy Bear makes the perfect gift for anyone who loves teddy bears. Our 13" Honey Bonnie Teddy Bear is a beautiful, traditional bear made especially for cuddles. He sits just right and is produced to the highest standard! The perfect gift for all ages.
